name: Sunday Grand Jomtien Pattaya
detail: I could easily walk to restaurants, shops, and attractions.

name: Sunday Beachfront View Jomtien Pattaya
detail: ‼️เป็นคอนโด แต่มาทำเป็นห้องพัก โดยรวมดีมากๆ คุ้มค่ากับห้องพักราคานี้ พร้อมอาหารเช้า โลเคชั่นถือว่าดี ใกล้ร้านสะดวกซื้อ ร้านอาหาร ใกล้ทะเล ค่ำๆมีร้านให้นั่งชิวๆ ฟังเพลง พนักงานต้อนรับอัธยาศรัยดี มี รปภ. ที่จอดรถๆได้ประมาณ 10-12คัน พักอาคาร Dชั้น 5 wifiแรงดีมากๆ ห้องพักสะอาด ห้องน้ำดี แต่ที่ระบายน้ำอยู่สูงนิดนึงเวลาอายน่ำตีองใช้เท้ากวาดน้ำให้ไหลลงท่อ ชั้นบนมีสระว่ายน้ำ ขนาดไม่ใหญ่ แต่ก็พอเล่นได้ พร้อมห้องฟิตเนส พร่อมที่นั่ง เล่น ค่ำๆถ่ายรูปวิวทะเล ‼️ ช่วงเข้าพักมีทัวร์จีนมาลงเต็ม แต่ก็ไม่รบกวนเท่าไหร่ ช่วงเช้าพนักงานแนะนำให้ลงมาทายอาหารสายนิดนึง เพราะช่วงเช้าประมาณหกโมงถึงเจ็ดโมง กลุ่มทัวร์จะลงมาทานกันก็ไม่เป็นไรเพราะปกติลงมาประมาณแปดโมงอยู่แล้ว อาหารรสชาดกลางๆ รับได้ ❤️❤️❤️โดยรวมให้ผ่านครับ กับที่พักราคานี้พร้อมอาหารเช้า คราวหน้าคงมาพักที่นี่อีกครับ

name: Sunday Chateau En Ville - Pattaya
detail: The location was peaceful and perfect for a relaxing stay.

name: Nonze Hostel
detail: On my conquest of travelling around the world, having visited Pattaya multiple times, this is the hotel that stands out, being a hotel that deserves recognition and writing a review for. If I could, I would rate it a 5 star hostel, not a 2.5 star like humbly mentioned. It really exceeds my expectation. I believe that everyone who visits Pattaya for the first time should visit, you will not regret it and will definitely come back to visit again. Trust me, I’ve been there. My experience: I came to this location through google maps, but the sign is easily noticeable and you will appreciate it as it is just next to a large department store in the area; Royal Garden - I find it very valuable for a small hostel to be so easy to navigate to in the busy streets, and the convience of being able to get everything just nearby. My friends and I usually have the problem where, early in the morning, the quality restaurants are not yet opened and the street food are believed to be unclean. This hostel is just above a McDonalds which is open for 24hrs, so it solved all our problem concerning food :) We came here late at night so we did not see the view of the sea that clearly, but in the morning, we saw the sun rise just above the sea and I find that an experience to share. It is a must see for everyone who comes to pattaya. Before I booked, I checked the relative prices of nearby hotels which is much more expensive for a single room, but the reason I chose this hostel is because it is newly opened, fingers crossed as I booked, turns out a choice worth the risk and unbelievably clean! Do you understand the feeling of a new hotel, where everything from the toilet seats are brand new, white and clean! This is exactly my experience. The attention to detail is all cared for, clean new beds and pillows! Last but not least, the Wi-Fi, so damn fast, so speedy. Almost no delay in streaming Euro 2016.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Ibis Pattaya
detail: it's a memorable experience staying in ibis pattaya hotel. at the price of usd 40, the hotel achieved more than what we expected. it takes only 5 minutes to walk to the beach. there are plenty of restaurants along the beach. if you are a show-person, don't miss tiffany's show which is just next door to the hotel. the show costs 600 thai baht and above. the hotel interior is amazing. despite the limited space, the beds and furniture were arranged economically and cozily. ibis pattaya hotel is indeed one of the best value hotels i have ever stayed. a definite yes for a return.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Arbour Hotel and Residence Pattaya
detail: The rooftop bar and restaurant is absolutely amazing.

name: Hotel Vista
detail: the hotel is a good one and I stayed there on my last 10 visites to pattaya. the location is on soi 4 between 2nd road with resturants and the new big c mall and beach road short way to the beach and to transportation to walking street. there are many restarunts in the area including one big in the parking of the bacara the ladyboy show that have great thai food. breakfast at the hotel is good better than in most of the hotels and if you pay with your agoda reservation it cheap. they have buffea BBK sea food dinner for 600 B to hotel guest it good. swimming pool is big and great for children and adult . and also the fitness room is good (not big) but i didnt used it. staff is very helpfull . one day i had breakfast at 6am and after I couldnt open the door of my room because some problem with the electronic door tecnition came immidiatly try to help and fix it and then when he didnt succid he changed to a new locker and all that at 6.30 AM. I warmly recomand vista pattaya hotel but you must book at agoda (cheaper than direct bokking) as soon as posible the hotel most of the time is fully booked and cancelasion is free till a week before check in . one advice usualy you cant room before 14.00 as it alwayes fully booked and they are cleaning the rooms.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Travelodge Pattaya
detail: Great stay at OZO Pattaya Hotel. This was my first time in Pattaya and i am happy that i decided to stay at OZO. The staff that clesned the rooms on the 5TH floor were great. Reception staff were also very helpfull. I would say to friends to try OZO Hotel...

name: Pattaya Modus Beachfront Resort
detail: Please note my location score is based on self driving. Our preferred hotel (100meters away) was booked out so I reserved for the weekend @ Modus. The hotel gave us complementary early check in on morning arrival. Rooms are good sized and have botiqe flare with nice bathroom (dobble washing basin). 3 individual pools including one pool bar - all verry nice. Beach is as good as it gets in Pattaya area. The hotel team is absolutely outstanding from maid, waiter, security to reception everyone was professional, attentive and friendly. The silver cutlery in room & all restaurant is a great touch. We can highly reccomend Modus Beachfront Resort Pattaya!

name: Hotel Amber Pattaya
detail: For a 4 star hotel you are not going to get anything better!!! A brand new hotel that is immaculate, gym, sauna, nice pool area and a great room. We had a Superior room with a queen bed that was so comfortable. Buffet breakfast was nice with plenty of options English, Thai and Indian. Location is perfect, on a quieter street set back a little but walk 2 mins up the street and you are right in mix for bars and everything Pattaya offers. Price point was fantastic value for money. You can not go wrong staying athe Hotel Amber.
